reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de la sra del servicompras, no es un shop tan variado pero se encuentra lo básico, hay que tener paciencia y los precios accesibles por ser que es la única estación en los alrededores.
Bien ubicada frente al lago, los baños limpios, hay que pedir la llave sólo para clientes o socios ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the convenience store attendant. It's not a huge shop, but you can find the basics. You need to be patient, and the prices are reasonable since it's the only station in the area. It's well-located across from the lake, and the restrooms are clean. You have to ask for the key; only ACA customers or members need to ask.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5czV2MDJnRRAB
